teamMembers.name: Hunter Owen, DDS
teamMembers.title: Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Owen is a Texas-trained dentist known for hospitality-first care, advanced cosmetic training through Kois Center coursework, and long-term patient relationships built on comfort and trust.

teamMembers.name: Darren Crosbie, DDS
teamMembers.title: Dentist
teamMembers.bio: Dr. Crosbie is a Texas native with advanced training in Invisalign, implant placement and restoration, and single-visit all-ceramic crowns using in-house milling technology.

teamMembers.name: North Dallas Dental Group Team
teamMembers.title: Clinical and Guest Experience Team
teamMembers.bio: The team emphasizes warm, efficient visits, clear communication around treatment and costs, and a fear-free experience for families and long-time patients.

testimonials.author: Elizabeth M.
testimonials.text: Always a consistent, great experience at this office. The professionalism here is unmatched and I feel confident in the treatment I am getting.

testimonials.author: Lindsie R.
testimonials.text: The staff has been extremely efficient, professional, and charismatic. I loved being able to share my fears and wishes before treatment.

testimonials.author: Julie S.
testimonials.text: I've been seeing Dr. Crosbie for 10+ years and always have a great experience. The team honors my time and makes me feel at ease.

testimonials.author: Raphael V.
testimonials.text: The office is super clean, the staff is always friendly, and Dr. Owen puts out top-notch work while keeping every visit comfortable.

rawPageText: North Dallas Dental Group positions itself as a Dallas practice delivering an extraordinary, hospitality-first experience with general, cosmetic, and restorative dentistry. Repeated messaging emphasizes that patients should feel at home, listened to, and treated like family, with fear-free comprehensive exams, gentle cleanings, and modern diagnostics. Service pages list preventive care, emergency treatment, periodontal therapy, root canal therapy, Invisalign, dental implants, veneers, same-day crowns, and dentures. Doctor bios highlight Hunter Owen, DDS and Darren Crosbie, DDS, with advanced training in cosmetic and comprehensive dentistry, implant care, and in-house technology including digital impressions, 3D printing, and single-visit crowns. Testimonial themes repeatedly mention professionalism, transparent treatment costs, friendly staff, and long-term patient loyalty. Core contact details include 17120 Dallas Parkway Suite 150, Dallas TX 75248 and phone (972) 407-1333, with weekday office hours and online appointment booking via Flexbook.
